word: H4354 - מָכִירִי - Mâkîyrîy - maw-kee-ree' - Of Machir

sections.paragraph:
Original: מכירי

Transliteration: mâkı̂yrı̂y

Phonetic: maw-kee-ree'

BDB Definition:

Machirites = "a salesman"
  1. the descendants of Machir the father of Gilead

Origin: patronymical from H4353

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
